TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_masaatiladay_nu_Yin-tu, title = u_masaatiladay_nu_Yin-tu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_masaatiladay_nu_Yin-tu} }

S.FORM: u masaatiladay nu Yin-tu(kamu nu Hulam:ŚćįŚļ¶śĚŅŚ°ä) (kamu nu Amuhuwan:Indian Plate) u masaatiladay nu Yin-tu hananay sa, u mikisabaay tu nu masaatiladay, u tungusay nu Yin-tu atu Au-zo masaatiladay ku nikahida, pasu ya Yin-tu hananay a bayu. nika masaatiladay nu Yin-tu nika tahekal namay i siwaay a malebut nu a mang a nu ayaway a Pay-e'-ci , nu makay i nu walian nu Fuy-zo ya Ma-ta-jia-si-jia nikalaliyas, paymihcaan pasay amis a nipipawpaw makaala tu sabaw limaay a hunan, hakay iti limaay a malebut katukuh i limaay a mang idaw ku limaay a lasubu nu a mang i ayaway sa, ya baluhayay a zi-day atu Ya-zo nika sasetulan sa depit satu, i mahida, ya Yin-tu masaatiladay nika pawpawan makaala tu hakay 2,000-3,000 cacay a malebut a depah ku nihatida ku laad, kikatinengan ku nu dumaay a masaatiladay ku nikalamkam. ya tapiingan nu pakay timulan O-ya hananay masaatiladay, duduc sa tiya Yin-tu atu Ni-po-er nu nikasasetulan, kasaupuan a nikatatungduhan kakayda sa tu malasatalakaway a enal atu Si-ma-la-ya hananay a buyu', ya Yin-tu hananay a masaatiladay ayda sa pasayda i nu wali micapi tu amis paymihcaan nipawpawan makaala tu limaay a hunan, uyda sa ya O-ya hananay masaatiladay paymihcaan pasay nu amisan nipipawpawan makaala tu tusaay a hunan, zayhan kakayda satu malubiyaw kya O-ya hananay masaatiladay, ya Yin-tu masaatiladay paymihcaan masukud idaw ku sepatay a cacayay a bataan nu cacay nu hunan.
S.PHON: u masaatir~…ĺadaj nu jin-tu(kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:****) (kamu nu amuńßuwan:indian pr~…ĺat…ô) u masaatir~…ĺadaj nu jin-tu ńßananaj sa, u mikisabaaj tu nu masaatir~…ĺadaj, u tuŇčusaj nu jin-tu atu au-zo masaatir~…ĺadaj ku nikańßida, pasu ja jin-tu ńßananaj a baju. nika masaatir~…ĺadaj nu jin-tu nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺ namaj i siwaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu a maŇč a nu ajawaj a paj-…ô Ē~ °- ¶i , nu makaj i nu war~…ĺian nu fuj-zo ja ma-ta-jia-si-jia nikar~…ĺar~…ĺijas, pajmińß ¶aan pasaj amis a nipipawpaw makaar~…ĺa tu sabaw r~…ĺimaaj a ńßunan, ńßakaj iti r~…ĺimaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut katukuńß i r~…ĺimaaj a maŇč idaw ku r~…ĺimaaj a r~…ĺasubu nu a maŇč i ajawaj sa, ja bar~…ĺuńßajaj a zi-daj atu ja-zo nika sas…ôtur~…ĺan sa d…ôpit satu, i mańßida, ja jin-tu masaatir~…ĺadaj nika pawpawan makaar~…ĺa tu ńßakaj *,***-*,*** ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a d…ôpańß ku nińßatida ku r~…ĺaad, kikatin…ôŇčan ku nu dumaaj a masaatir~…ĺadaj ku nikar~…ĺamkam. ja tapiiŇčan nu pakaj timur~…ĺan o-ja ńßananaj masaatir~…ĺadaj, dudu ¶ sa tija jin-tu atu ni-po-…ôr nu nikasas…ôtur~…ĺan, kasaupuan a nikatatuŇčduńßan kakajda sa tu mar~…ĺasatar~…ĺakawaj a …ônar~…ĺ atu si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja ńßananaj a buju Ē~ °, ja jin-tu ńßananaj a masaatir~…ĺadaj ajda sa pasajda i nu war~…ĺi mi ¶api tu amis pajmińß ¶aan nipawpawan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺimaaj a ńßunan, ujda sa ja o-ja ńßananaj masaatir~…ĺadaj pajmińß ¶aan pasaj nu amisan nipipawpawan makaar~…ĺa tu tusaaj a ńßunan, zajńßan kakajda satu mar~…ĺubijaw kja o-ja ńßananaj masaatir~…ĺadaj, ja jin-tu masaatir~…ĺadaj pajmińß ¶aan masukud idaw ku s…ôpataj a ¶a ¶ajaj a bataan nu ¶a ¶aj nu ńßunan.
S.FORM: u masaatiladay nu Yin-tu(kamu nu Hulam:ŚćįŚļ¶śĚŅŚ°ä) (kamu nu Amuhuwan:Indian Plate) u masaatiladay nu Yin-tu hananay sa, u mikisabaay tu nu masaatiladay, u tungusay nu Yin-tu atu Au-zo masaatiladay ku nikahida, pasu ya Yin-tu hananay a bayu. nika masaatiladay nu Yin-tu nika tahekal namay i siwaay a malebut nu a mang a nu ayaway a Pay-e'-ci , nu makay i nu walian nu Fuy-zo ya Ma-ta-jia-si-jia nikalaliyas, paymihcaan pasay amis a nipipawpaw makaala tu sabaw limaay a hunan, hakay iti limaay a malebut katukuh i limaay a mang idaw ku limaay a lasubu nu a mang i ayaway sa, ya baluhayay a zi-day atu Ya-zo nika sasetulan sa depit satu, i mahida, ya Yin-tu masaatiladay nika pawpawan makaala tu hakay 2,000-3,000 cacay a malebut a depah ku nihatida ku laad, kikatinengan ku nu dumaay a masaatiladay ku nikalamkam. ya tapiingan nu pakay timulan O-ya hananay masaatiladay, duduc sa tiya Yin-tu atu Ni-po-er nu nikasasetulan, kasaupuan a nikatatungduhan kakayda sa tu malasatalakaway a enal atu Si-ma-la-ya hananay a buyu', ya Yin-tu hananay a masaatiladay ayda sa pasayda i nu wali micapi tu amis paymihcaan nipawpawan makaala tu limaay a hunan, uyda sa ya O-ya hananay masaatiladay paymihcaan pasay nu amisan nipipawpawan makaala tu tusaay a hunan, zayhan kakayda satu malubiyaw kya O-ya hananay masaatiladay, ya Yin-tu masaatiladay paymihcaan masukud idaw ku sepatay a cacayay a bataan nu cacay nu hunan.
S.PHON: u masaatir~…ĺadaj nu jin-tu(kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:****) (kamu nu amuńßuwan:indian pr~…ĺat…ô) u masaatir~…ĺadaj nu jin-tu ńßananaj sa, u mikisabaaj tu nu masaatir~…ĺadaj, u tuŇčusaj nu jin-tu atu au-zo masaatir~…ĺadaj ku nikańßida, pasu ja jin-tu ńßananaj a baju. nika masaatir~…ĺadaj nu jin-tu nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺ namaj i siwaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu a maŇč a nu ajawaj a paj-…ô Ē~ °- ¶i , nu makaj i nu war~…ĺian nu fuj-zo ja ma-ta-jia-si-jia nikar~…ĺar~…ĺijas, pajmińß ¶aan pasaj amis a nipipawpaw makaar~…ĺa tu sabaw r~…ĺimaaj a ńßunan, ńßakaj iti r~…ĺimaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut katukuńß i r~…ĺimaaj a maŇč idaw ku r~…ĺimaaj a r~…ĺasubu nu a maŇč i ajawaj sa, ja bar~…ĺuńßajaj a zi-daj atu ja-zo nika sas…ôtur~…ĺan sa d…ôpit satu, i mańßida, ja jin-tu masaatir~…ĺadaj nika pawpawan makaar~…ĺa tu ńßakaj *,***-*,*** ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a d…ôpańß ku nińßatida ku r~…ĺaad, kikatin…ôŇčan ku nu dumaaj a masaatir~…ĺadaj ku nikar~…ĺamkam. ja tapiiŇčan nu pakaj timur~…ĺan o-ja ńßananaj masaatir~…ĺadaj, dudu ¶ sa tija jin-tu atu ni-po-…ôr nu nikasas…ôtur~…ĺan, kasaupuan a nikatatuŇčduńßan kakajda sa tu mar~…ĺasatar~…ĺakawaj a …ônar~…ĺ atu si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja ńßananaj a buju Ē~ °, ja jin-tu ńßananaj a masaatir~…ĺadaj ajda sa pasajda i nu war~…ĺi mi ¶api tu amis pajmińß ¶aan nipawpawan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺimaaj a ńßunan, ujda sa ja o-ja ńßananaj masaatir~…ĺadaj pajmińß ¶aan pasaj nu amisan nipipawpawan makaar~…ĺa tu tusaaj a ńßunan, zajńßan kakajda satu mar~…ĺubijaw kja o-ja ńßananaj masaatir~…ĺadaj, ja jin-tu masaatir~…ĺadaj pajmińß ¶aan masukud idaw ku s…ôpataj a ¶a ¶ajaj a bataan nu ¶a ¶aj nu ńßunan.
